text.title: Claude API Integration Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure to build `ClaudeService` over a hardened Anthropic client, covering completion, streaming, tool use, vision, caching and batch.

step.name: Adopt hardened client.
step.description: Input: outputs from `[[claude-api-basics]]`. Action: import the configured client + retry decorator; assert env auth + pinned model + cost tracker. Output: `self.client` field on `ClaudeService`.
step.note: Step 1. Required input: hardened Anthropic client.

step.name: Define `ClaudeConfig`.
step.description: Input: surface requirements. Action: build a dataclass with `model`, `max_tokens`, `system` (str or list[dict]), `thinking` (optional), `tools` (optional). Output: `ClaudeConfig` dataclass.

step.name: Wire sync + async + streaming completions.
step.description: Input: ClaudeConfig. Action: `complete()` calls `messages.create`; `acomplete()` uses `AsyncAnthropic`; `stream()` wraps `messages.stream`. Centralise `stop_reason` discipline in all three. Output: three call methods.

step.name: Wire tool use + vision.
step.description: Input: tool registry + image inputs. Action: implement `agent_loop()` with `tool_use_id` round-trip + max-iterations guard; implement `analyze_image()` base64 + URL + PDF, image-first ordering, page-count check. Output: `agent_loop()` + `analyze_image()` methods.

step.name: Wire Extended Thinking, Prompt Caching, Batch API.
step.description: Input: workload knobs. Action: thinking branch removes `temperature` and sets `max_tokens = budget + 4096`; caching branch enforces `cache_control:{"type":"ephemeral"}` only on prefixes ≥1024 tokens; batch branch wires submit + poll + resubmit-errored loop. Output: three feature branches.

step.name: Validate.
step.description: Input: assembled config JSON. Action: run `scripts/validate-claude-api-integration.py`; run smoke test against `templates/_smoke-test.py`; check cache hit ratio on a 10-call burst. Output: green validator + green smoke.
